Upstream:  bitcoin-core/secp256k1
Origin:    https://github.com/bitcoin-core/secp256k1
Tag:       v0.6.0
Commit:    0cdc758a56360bf58a851fe91085a327ec97685a
License:   MIT (see COPYING in this directory)

Provides the secp256k1 ECDSA-verify and Schnorr (BIP340) verify primitives for
the Plutus builtins verifyEcdsaSecp256k1Signature and
verifySchnorrSecp256k1Signature. Only the verify path of the core library plus
the extrakeys and schnorrsig modules are compiled.

Build configuration (no autotools, no code generation):
  This release configures purely through preprocessor defines; it does not
  generate a libsecp256k1-config.h and does not need HAVE_CONFIG_H. The build
  defines are set on the isolated CMake OBJECT target (see lib/CMakeLists.txt):
    ENABLE_MODULE_EXTRAKEYS=1   - x-only public keys (schnorr dependency)
    ENABLE_MODULE_SCHNORRSIG=1  - BIP340 Schnorr signatures
    ECMULT_WINDOW_SIZE=8        - small ecmult window: the verify table is 8 KiB
                                  (vs 1 MiB at the upstream default of 15); secp
                                  verify is a rarely-used cold path, so the lean
                                  binary is worth the small verify slowdown
    SECP256K1_STATIC            - consume the API as a static library (no DLL
                                  import/export decoration on Windows)
  The recovery, ECDH, ellswift and musig modules are intentionally not defined
  and therefore not compiled. Wide multiplication, field and scalar backends are
  auto-selected by src/util.h with a portable C fallback; no assembly is forced.

Precomputed tables:
  src/precomputed_ecmult.c and src/precomputed_ecmult_gen.c are the generated
  tables that ship checked in with this release. They are compiled as-is, so no
  precompute/codegen step (precompute_ecmult.c / precompute_ecmult_gen.c) and no
  autotools run is required. Those two generator programs are not vendored.

Vendored files:
  COPYING                          - upstream MIT license, copied verbatim.
  include/secp256k1.h              - core public API.
  include/secp256k1_preallocated.h - included by secp256k1.c.
  include/secp256k1_extrakeys.h    - x-only pubkey public API.
  include/secp256k1_schnorrsig.h   - BIP340 public API.
  src/secp256k1.c                  - the single core translation unit; it pulls
                                     in the enabled module impls by ENABLE_MODULE_*.
  src/precomputed_ecmult.c         - checked-in ecmult table.
  src/precomputed_ecmult_gen.c     - checked-in ecmult-gen table.
  src/*.h                          - the internal headers secp256k1.c includes
                                     (field/group/scalar/ecmult/ecdsa/eckey/hash/
                                     modinv/int128/scratch/hsort/assumptions/
                                     checkmem/selftest/util and the precomputed
                                     table headers).
  src/modules/extrakeys/main_impl.h
  src/modules/schnorrsig/main_impl.h

Removed from the upstream tree to keep this lean (no copyright text altered):
  - Unused modules: src/modules/{ecdh,recovery,ellswift,musig} and their public
    headers include/secp256k1_{ecdh,recovery,ellswift,musig}.h.
  - Tests and benchmarks: src/tests.c, src/tests_exhaustive.c, src/ctime_tests.c,
    src/bench*.c, src/bench.h, the wycheproof test vectors and the per-module
    tests_impl.h / tests_exhaustive_impl.h / bench_impl.h.
  - Test-only internal headers: src/testrand*.h, src/testutil.h, and the
    exhaustive-test scalar backend src/scalar_low.h / src/scalar_low_impl.h
    (only included under EXHAUSTIVE_TEST_ORDER, which is never defined here).
  - The table generators src/precompute_ecmult.c and src/precompute_ecmult_gen.c
    (the checked-in tables above are used instead).
  - Build tooling: configure.ac, Makefile.am, autogen.sh, CMakeLists.txt,
    cmake/, src/CMakeLists.txt, the asm sources under src/asm, the examples/ and
    contrib/ trees, CI and documentation files.
